title: Apple finally patches Hide My Email security flaw — a year after it was first discovered
summary: The Hide My Email feature is part of the paid iCloud + offering and allows users to quickly create a new, anonymous email address - very handy for people who don’t want to share their email with different products across the web.
caption: output/2026-07-22/apple-finally-patches-hide-my-email-security-flaw-a-year-after-it-was-.txt
